title: Sports
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: USA's Malik Tillman Says He’d 'Love to Player For' Arsenal One Day
items.description: Malik Tillman highlighted Arsenal as a Premier League club he would "love to play for."

items.title: No. 17 St. John's Smacks Creighton, Marking Longest Winning Streak in 4 Decades
items.description: No. 17 St. John’s blew out Creighton on Saturday for its 13th straight win, marking the school’s longest winning streak in 41 years.

items.title: Canada Captain Alphonso Davies Limps Off With Injured Hamstring In Bayern Win
items.description: Canada captain Alphonso Davies has gone off injured during Bayern Munich’s Bundesliga win over Eintracht Frankfurt.

items.title: MLB Spring Training Buzz: Dodgers Claim Jack Suwinski Off Waivers From Pirates
items.description: Notable news, notes and buzz with MLB spring training ramping up ahead of the World Baseball Classic and Opening Day.

items.title: All Rise! Yankees Star Aaron Judge Hits 2 Home Runs in Spring Training Debut
items.description: Reigning American League MVP Aaron Judge hit two home runs in his 2026 spring training debut for the Yankees.

items.title: Yankees' Judge slugs 2 HRs, 'excited' about WBC
items.description: Yankees slugger Aaron Judge hit two homers in his spring debut Saturday as he gears up for next month's World Baseball Classic with Team USA.

items.title: Cactus cameo: Dodgers play Ohtani before WBC
items.description: Shohei Ohtani is scheduled to play a couple of Cactus League games for the Dodgers before he joins Team Japan for the World Baseball Classic.
